The Lagna is strong. It is in its own Navamsa. The lord of the
t.agna is strong as it is conjoined by its dispositor. A strong Surya occupying
its own house fully aspects the Lagna and further strengthens the
Lagna. The Buddha fully aspects the Lagna. The Buddha ruJes a Trine
and occupies a Kendra. The Buddha conjoins its dispositor. The Lagna,
therefore, gains in strength by the full aspect of the Buddha. The
Lagna is fully aspected by three planets including its lord. The Lagna has
missed thoe complete Raja Yoga of very great sig.nificance by the absence
